Kirpi.CLI 0.3.0-alpha
Copyright (c) 2019 orcun

  -o, --output      Output folder of the transformation.

  -f, --filter      Output file filter pattern. If specified, only files that
                    match this pattern will be output.

  -g, --ghost       List output files. If specified, only file names will be
                    listed, their contents won't be changed.

  -t, --template    Required. Root folder for template files.

  -p, --params      Template parameter file.

  -w, --watch       (Default: false) Kirpi will watch template and source files.
                    When files change, it will regenerate output.

  -s, --source      (Default: swagger.yaml) Main input file to be processed by
                    the command.

  -l, --log         (Default: Information) Set log level to Trace, Debug,
                    Information, Warning, Error, Critical, or None.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
